Is This for You

This is for you if:

  • you are a trained coach with no working go-to-market system
  • you have done the inner work but the outer structure is missing
  • you tried to explain your offer and it did not land

This is not for you if you are looking for motivation, accountability, or more content to consume.
The Shift

Before and after Signal Dojo Core.

Before
  • You know what you believe but cannot articulate it in a way that moves people.
  • You have an offer in your head but nothing you would confidently send someone.
  • Every week feels like starting over.
After
  • A personal brand strategy built from your actual experience and values.
  • A customer avatar built from real audience language.
  • An offer with clear structure, pricing, and transformation language.
  • A landing page that converts the right person into a paying client.

The inner work does not precede the outer work. They develop together. Signal Dojo Core is where that development begins.

Get Signal Dojo Core
How It Works

Four sequenced prompts.
Each output feeds the next.

01

Personal Brand Strategy

Who you are, who you serve, what makes your positioning distinct. Not a branding exercise. A strategic foundation built from what you already know and have lived.

02

Customer Avatar

Your audience in their own language. Pain, desire, objections. Built from real signal — not assumptions about who you think they are.

03

Offer

What you are selling, how it is structured, what transformation it delivers, and how to price it with confidence. An offer you would send to a stranger without hesitation.

04

Landing Page

The page that converts a stranger into a buyer. Built directly from the three outputs above. No starting from scratch.

Each prompt was built from over twenty years of work in product design, behavioral systems, and human performance. You move through one question at a time. It feels like a conversation, not a homework assignment.

Delivered through Skool. Workspace is a portable Google Doc, downloadable and yours to keep.

This is not a course. It is a go-to-market operating system.

Frequently Asked Questions

Answered directly.

I am not sure about my niche yet.

That is the starting point for most people. The Personal Brand Strategy prompt surfaces your positioning from what you already know and have lived. You do not need answers before you begin.

I have already done some of this work.

Signal Dojo Core collects what you already have and uses it as input. You do not start over. What comes out is a validated foundation built from your existing work, not in spite of it.

I need more support than a self-directed system.

Signal Dojo Lab and Studio exist for that. Lab adds weekly group calls. Studio adds weekly 1:1 access to Adrian. Signal Dojo Core is the foundation both are built on. Start here.

Is this the right time?

Every week without a system is a week of compounding friction. Signal Dojo Core is self-directed. You set the pace.
